## Review Contract

- [ ] Governing design doc(s) read:
- [ ] Requirement doc(s) read:
- [ ] Docs updated, or `N/A` with reason:
- [ ] Tests added/updated, including `Validates:` coverage where applicable:
- [ ] Final self-review completed against the exact merged diff that will be pushed:
- [ ] Latest PR head SHA recorded:

## Codex Review Disposition

- [ ] `no findings`
- [ ] Every Codex finding is listed below with its fix or rebuttal link

| Finding | Resolution |
| --- | --- |
|  |  |
